prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: KOL-TTX-MINIGARDENTOOLSET-3PC-BUN Product Type: GARDEN_TOOL_SET Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 3pc Mini Garden Tools Set with Hand Trowels and Cultivator, Container Planting Succulents Herbs and Small Gardening Projects (7 Inches) Description: Make small gardening projects easier with this 3pc mini garden tool set, designed for container planting, succulent pots, herb gardens, seedlings, flower pots, indoor plant care and more. The compact size is ideal for working in tight spaces where full size garden tools feel too large, such as small planters, window boxes, terrariums, raised tabletop gardens and containers.

This lightweight gardening tool kit includes two small hand trowels and one mini cultivator, giving you the essential mini gardening tools needed for digging, transplanting, loosening soil, aerating potting mix and placing soil around delicate plants. Each tool measures approximately 7 inches long and the full set weighs only 0.20lbs, making the tools lightweight and easy to control for precise gardening tasks.

Crafted with smooth wood handles and durable metal heads, this mini garden tool set offers a natural look with practical everyday function. Use it for succulents, cactus plants, herbs, seedlings, houseplants, container gardens and very small gardening projects. The compact 3pc set also makes a thoughtful gift for plant lovers, apartment gardeners, beginner gardeners and anyone who enjoys caring for small plants. Search Terms: Garden tool set; garden tools; gardening hand tools; succulent pots; container gardening; hand trowel; cultivator; yard rake; herb garden; apartment essentials; potting bench; indoor plants; gardening gifts; housewarming gifts new home; planting pots Features: - 3PC MINI GARDEN TOOL SET: Includes two small hand trowels and one mini cultivator for container gardening, succulent pots, herb garden, seedling care, raised planters, indoor plants and small gardening projects - LIGHTWEIGHT GARDENING HAND TOOLS: Designed for delicate planting tasks, this mini garden tool set has a total set weight of 0.20lbs, making it easy to handle while working with small pots, flower starts, herbs, houseplants and more - WOOD HANDLES & METAL HEADS: Each garden tool features a smooth wood handle for a comfortable grip and a metal head for light digging, loosening soil, transplanting, aerating and moving potting mix around small planters - IDEAL FOR PLANTING POTS: Great for succulents, cactus plants, herbs, seedlings, flower pots and indoor plant care, this mini tool set is a useful choice for apartment gardening, patio gardening and giftable gardening kits - 7 INCH TOOL LENGTH: Each compact garden hand tool measures approximately 7 inches long, offering a practical size for tight spaces, shallow planters, patio pots, window boxes, terrariums and small container gardens === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 3-pc Mini Garden Tool Set with Hand Trowels
